summary: Iteration 57: Unified Document View - All features verified working. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All 10 features verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 verified the new unified document view for clients. Key findings: (1) Client sidebar now shows 'Documents & Steps' tab instead of 4 separate tabs (Workflow Steps, Document Checklist, Doc Completion, Action Required are removed), (2) UnifiedDocumentView.jsx shows progress card with completion %, stats (Required/Uploaded/Pending/Requested), step cards with expandable documents, (3) CM '+Add Doc' inside step opens dialog titled 'Add Document to Step: [Step Name]', (4) CM 'Request Additional Document' opens separate dialog, (5) Admin workflow step documents persist and sync to client cases, (6) test_sale_client can see step documents with admin defaults synced.

client_sidebar_cleanup.details: Old tabs removed: 'Workflow Steps', 'Document Checklist', 'Doc Completion', 'Action Required'. New tabs present: 'My Journey', 'Documents & Steps', 'My Uploads', 'My Info Sheet'.

unified_document_view.details: UnifiedDocumentView component shows: Document Progress card (20% completion), stats (10 Required, 2 Uploaded, 8 Pending, 1 Requested), 8 step cards with expandable documents.

step_card_expansion.details: Clicking step card expands to show documents with doc names, mandatory tags, source badges (CM Requested), Upload buttons, and status badges.

action_required_banner.details: Banner shows '1 additional document(s) requested by your Case Manager' with View button that scrolls to additional docs section.

step_documents_api.details: GET /api/step-documents/case/{case_id} returns merged admin docs + CM docs + additional requests from both collections. Response includes steps, additional_requests, other_uploads, and summary.

cm_add_doc_to_step.details: CM case detail shows '+Add Doc' button inside unlocked steps. Dialog titled 'Add Document to Step: Integration Test Step'. Uses POST /api/step-documents/request-step-doc endpoint.

cm_request_additional_document.details: CM case detail shows 'Request Additional Document' button in header. Dialog titled 'Request Additional Document'. Uses POST /api/step-documents/request-additional endpoint.

admin_workflow_step_documents.details: Admin Products page shows workflow steps with document counts. Edit Workflow dialog shows steps with Required Documents (e.g., ECA step: 'ECA Report *', 'Degree Certificate *').

admin_default_docs_sync.details: test_sale_client sees admin-defined docs in their step view. Step 1 shows 'Passport' (mandatory) with Upload button. Step 2 (ECA) shows 0/2 documents.

test_sale_client_step_documents.details: test_sale_client@example.com can login and see Documents & Steps tab with 3 step cards, 0% completion (0/3 docs), and admin default documents synced.

unified_document_view.progress_card: Shows 20% completion (2/10 docs) with gradient color based on progress
unified_document_view.action_required_banner: Shows when additional docs requested by CM
unified_document_view.step_cards: 8 expandable step cards with status badges and document counts

cm_case_detail.add_doc_buttons: 1 +Add Doc button visible in unlocked step
cm_case_detail.add_doc_dialog_title: Add Document to Step: Integration Test Step

admin_products.workflow_steps_visible: 4 steps for Canada PR with document counts
admin_products.edit_workflow_dialog: Shows steps with Required Documents section

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
